subject: english
learning_objectives: Read and understand a novel extract

sections.heading: Passage (Part 1)
sections.content: The summary passage is an extract from the novel titled ‘The victims’ by I. Okpewho. In the passage, a woman named Nwabunor went to visit a soothsayer in order to overcome a challenge.

sections.heading: Passage (Part 2)
sections.content: The soothsayer told her what the gods demanded but she pleaded for the items to be reduced. In response, the soothsayer informed her that the dangers threatening her life and that of her son were too great. She was likely to lose her son if she failed to provide what the gods asked for.
